overall.description: Aerial drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic cityscape at sunset. The camera glides smoothly between towering skyscrapers adorned with massive holographic advertisements and neon signage, capturing the golden hour light mixing with artificial neon glows.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown business district with holographic advertising

agents.ego_description: flying slowly forward through the city canyon, approaching the central skyscraper cluster

entered.detail: dark building with prominent green neon 'softsys' signage
tall futuristic tower with stacked architectural segments and red structural elements
tall communication spire with multiple antenna arrays silhouetted against sunset
skyscraper featuring large vertical holographic advertisements with human faces
series of glowing pink and blue holographic billboards on building facade

segments.scene_description: Opening aerial view of a cyberpunk cityscape at golden hour. The camera drifts forward between towering structures, with the green neon 'softsys' building prominent on the left and a massive central skyscraper rising ahead. Holographic advertisements glow against the warm sunset backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown business district with holographic advertising

agents.ego_description: continuing forward approach toward the central skyscraper, maintaining steady altitude

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the city canyon, the softsys building falls behind as the camera approaches the central tower. The holographic advertisements on the central building grow larger and more detailed, displaying various characters in pink and blue neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown business district with holographic advertising

agents.ego_description: flying closely past the central skyscraper, revealing detailed holographic textures and building architecture

entered.detail: blue neon signage reading 'BYC' on building facade

segments.scene_description: Close flyby of the central skyscraper's facade, revealing intricate details of the holographic advertisements and building textures. The camera moves past the structure with the vertical ads now filling the left side of the frame, while a blue neon 'BYC' sign becomes visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide through a futuristic city canyon that transitions from a wide sunset vista to an intimate flyby of towering neon architecture. It begins by drifting forward between massive structures, with a green neon softsys building on the left and a central skyscraper rising against the warm golden hour light. As the camera moves deeper into the urban corridor, the softsys building recedes and the central tower looms larger, its holographic advertisements expanding into detailed figures of pink and blue neon. The scene then shifts into a close flyby of the skyscraper's facade, revealing intricate textures and glowing displays that fill the left side of the frame before finally passing a blue neon BYC sign on the right.
